name: all-types
description: One minimal, valid asset per ASSET_SPECS_INTERNAL type (all 14), plus a second workflow-program-yaml fixture so both workflow renderer forms (workflow-md and workflow-program-yaml) are represented.
purpose: Parity substrate for chunk-0b recognition/placement/renderer/lint goldens (WI-0b.3/WI-0b.4). Every file is placed at its type's canonical stashDir/placement path (asset-spec.ts toAssetPath) and carries the minimal frontmatter its dedicated linter (or DefaultLinter fallthrough) requires. 15 files total: one per of the 14 ASSET_SPECS_INTERNAL types (skill, command, agent, knowledge, workflow, script, memory, env, secret, wiki, lesson, task, session, fact) plus workflows/all-types-workflow-program.yaml (the workflow-program-yaml renderer form).
notes: workflow count is 2: workflows/all-types-workflow.md (workflow-md renderer) and workflows/all-types-workflow-program.yaml (workflow-program-yaml renderer).

tasks/all-types-task.yml is placed per asset-spec.ts's task placement rule (<stashDir>/<name>.yml) but does NOT recognize as type "task" via runMatchers() at HEAD b8fbc3a9 — DIR_TYPE_MAP's "tasks" dir rule (src/indexer/walk/matchers.ts:91-94) tests `ext === ".md"` instead of `".yml"`, a stale rule left over from the pre-0.8.0 markdown task format (see tests/integration/tasks-legacy-md-warning.test.ts). This is a genuine production recognition gap, not a fixture placement issue; captured as-is per chunk-0b's capture-only scope. See the chunk-0b WI-0b.2 report for detail.
